subparts.text: What are the advantages of R programming? 2.5
How do we install a package in R Program? What is the difference between a package and a library in R software? 2.5
Write a R Program to create a matrix taking a given vector of numbers as input and define the column and row names. Display the matrix. 2.5
Define an array. What is the difference between a matrix and an array? Write down the command for creating an array in R. 2.5

i) Write a R program to display the sum of Logarithms of three non-zero values entered by the user. ii) Write a R Program to create a vector. Extract the first and last element of your vector, storing them as new object. 3+2
Write a program in R : i) To multiply two vectors of different lengths ii) To display the square of a vector 2.5+2.5
Write a R Program to find sum, mean and product of a vector.
Define functions in R. What is the advantage of using functions in R? 2.5+2.5
Write a program to multiply two matrices in R. 5
Write a program in R for inverting a matrix. Verity that the product of these two matrices results in an identity matrix. 5
Create and store a three-dimensional array with six layers of a 4 x 2 matrix, filled with a decreasing sequence of values between 4.8 and 0 .1 of the appropriate length 5 **********
